data.title: Guess, Simulations Plus And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday
Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Levi Strauss Price Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
Bill Miller's Firm Slashed MicroStrategy Stake By 70%: The Move That Dodged A Costly Hit
data.description: Miller Value Partners, led by Bill Miller IV, reduced its MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) holdings by 70% to 15,250 shares from 50,250 shares in the fourth quarter of 2024, according to a 13F-HR filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Feb. 14.

data.title: Ford Launches 'From America, For America' Discount Program As Tariffs Threaten Vehicle Price Surge
data.description: Ford extends employee pricing to all car shoppers, coinciding with new 25% tariffs on imported vehicles and auto parts.

data.title: Trump Says US Near TikTok Deal, Reiterates Trade Relief Offer For China's Approval: 'Tariffs Give Us Great Power To Negotiate'
data.description: President Donald Trump confirmed that the U.S. is close to a deal to avoid banning TikTok, with ongoing discussions involving multiple investors and a potential tariff agreement with China to secure the sale.
